title: 30 Min Meeting between Imran Patel

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss syftdata's product capabilities and explore potential use for growthx.ai's marketing and sales operations.](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [syftdata offers a comprehensive B2B data platform integrating LinkedIn, website, and ad engagement data](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The product centralizes data from various sources, enriches contacts, and enables targeted actions through HubSpot and other tools](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Pricing is based on activated contacts (5,000 credits/month for $500), with flexibility for team usage and scaling](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Jason expressed interest in trying the product, particularly for consolidating LinkedIn engagement data](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### syftdata Product Overview

  - [Integrates data from LinkedIn, website visits, and ad engagements](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Enriches contacts with work email and company information](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Allows filtering based on custom ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) criteria](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Syncs data to HubSpot and other tools for streamlined operations](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Provides a unified view of customer interactions across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### LinkedIn Data Capabilities

  - [Tracks post engagements, comments, and DMs](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Offers connection request management](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Ensures compliance with LinkedIn's terms to avoid account issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Provides more comprehensive data compared to tools like Phantom Buster](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Pricing and Usage Model

  - [Base plan: $500/month for 5,000 credits (activated contacts)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Credits consumed only when new, qualified contacts are exported](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Unlimited team members can use the platform](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Flexible scaling options for additional credits](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Integration with Existing Stack

  - [Potential to replace multiple tools (e.g., Phantom Buster, partial HeyReach functionality)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Complements HubSpot by providing richer data and automation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Offers API integrations with various marketing and sales tools](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Future Product Direction

  - [Aiming to be a GTM-focused CDP (Customer Data Platform) for B2B companies](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Plans to expand data collection from other platforms (e.g., Substack, WhatsApp)](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on meeting customers where they are, beyond traditional inbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to sign up for syftdata's product on the website](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Imran to follow up on LinkedIn to schedule an onboarding call](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Jason to determine team members (including RevOps) to join the onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Set up a Slack channel for ongoing communication during the trial](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Jason to explore syftdata's potential fit within growthx.ai's tech stack](https://fathom.video/share/ZpMdikEkm6zEiUkynN-Hc9xZvQQSPW61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

action_items.description: Sign up for SIFT product on website
Determine team members (RevOps, 1-2 others) to join SIFT onboarding call
Send calendar availability for SIFT onboarding call via LinkedIn
Set up Slack channel for communication with Jason/GrowthX team re SIFT
Send Calendly link to Jason for scheduling SIFT onboarding call
